title: Settings
emailDescription: Receive daily summaries and important alerts
taskDescription: Get reminded about upcoming task deadlines
habitDescription: Daily reminders to complete your habits
pomodoroDescription: Get notified when a pomodoro session ends
dailyMotivationDescription: Receive a motivational message each morning
dangerDisclaimer: These actions are irreversible. Please be certain.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
failedToChangePassword: Failed to change password. Check your current password.
notifSaveInfo: Notification preferences will be saved with backend integration
accountDeleteInfo: Account deletion requires confirmation via email. Coming soon.

workingHours.title: Working hours
workingHours.description: Auto-Schedule uses these hours to find slots. Days left off cannot be auto-scheduled.
workingHours.invalidRange: End time must be after start time

sounds.title: Sounds
sounds.description: Play feedback sounds for completions and navigation.

googleCal.title: Google Calendar
googleCal.description: Connect your Google account and pick which calendars to sync.
googleCal.noCalendars: No calendars found for this account.

pushDescription: Receive alerts on this device even when the app is closed
pushBlockedByBrowser: Blocked by browser — enable in site settings

empty.title: No contexts yet
empty.description: Contexts group related channels. Start by creating a Work and Personal context.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Use these to call the Primeway API from scripts, Zapier, or other tools. Keys are shown once at creation — save them somewhere safe.
apiKeys.name: Name

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Receive POST notifications when events happen.
